note: seq=123: FIX sentinel+freshness FALSE-POSITIVE exposed by the seq-122 audit. The scheduled check read ONLY NextElapseUSecRealtime, which is EMPTY for monotonic (OnUnitActiveSec) timers -> 37 healthy timers mis-flagged DEAD_TIMER_NOT_SCHEDULED and needlessly revived every cycle (60s thrash + alert spam). FIX: scheduled = ActiveState==active(waiting) OR next-elapse set on EITHER clock (realtime OR monotonic). New pure is_scheduled() helper, selftest 8/8 incl the exact monotonic false-positive + 'truly dead' still caught; freshness 6/6. The disabled-probe detection is UNCHANGED (still caught). Re-proof in kick: disable probe -> sentinel --once must revive ONLY the probe now, not 37. Restarts the looping sentinel with fixed code (kills the thrash).

steps.note: seq=123: fix monotonic-timer false-positive in sentinel+freshness; re-prove probe-only revive.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_timer_sentinel.py':'69a20c4f01e948f8b5d49ef1f89c7a2e55f3791567dc574798670b8b58b5b03f','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_freshness_monitor.py':'51da76bf1ee9d1852ef80f068d1da6d0a2304ea5d5ea4f7f3ff72932d1a286ef'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('both sha ok')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','--now','atlas-sentinel-probe.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','disable','atlas-sentinel-probe.timer']); s.run(['/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_timer_sentinel.py','--once']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-timer-sentinel.service']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-timer-sentinel.service']); print('sentinel fixed + reproof ran')"
